title: CORE Artifact Type Declaration
description: Constitutional declaration of an artifact class CORE governs. Per ADR-090, this is the first ADR-084 D1 published contract — schema changes require governance amendment. Field additions must be backward-compatible (new optional fields permitted); semantic changes to existing fields and removals require a deprecation window.

id.description: Short stable identifier (lowercase, snake_case). Cannot change without governance amendment.

discovery.description: Glob patterns (relative to repo root) selecting instances of this artifact type. Replaces the role of .intent/enforcement/config/crawl_scopes.yaml (ADR-090 D7).

identity_key.description: How a single instance is uniquely addressed. Closed vocabulary (ADR-090 D2) — extending it is a governance amendment.

schema_ref.description: Optional pointer to a validation schema (e.g. JSON Schema path) for structured artifacts. Null for prose-shaped or AST-parsed types.

change_record.description: How an edit to an instance is represented. Closed vocabulary (ADR-090 D2) — extending it is a governance amendment.

vector_collection.description: Qdrant collection routing for vector indexing of instances. Absorbs the role of _QDRANT_COLLECTION_MAP in the crawler (ADR-090 D7).

crawler_indexed.description: Whether the repo crawler indexes instances of this type into the vector_collection. Optional; default true (any type in the registry is crawled unless it explicitly opts out). False allows a type to be governed without being indexed for semantic search. Added 2026-06-04 alongside ADR-090 D7 retirement — backward-compatible optional field per ADR-090 D6.

supported_sensors.description: Sensor IDs (F-42) that can observe this artifact type. Empty list permitted until F-42 lands (ADR-090 D5).

supported_actions.description: Atomic action IDs (F-43) that can mutate this artifact type. Empty list permitted until F-43 lands (ADR-090 D5).
